{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent thoroughly maps the novelty claim against prior works, identifying sharp deltas and rhetorical claims.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and corrects errors in citation formatting.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear uncertainty assessment.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text, such as unsubstantiated claims and weak baselines.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent thoroughly maps the novelty claim against prior works, identifying sharp deltas and rhetorical claims.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and corrects errors in citation formatting.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear uncertainty assessment.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text, such as unsubstantiated claims and weak baselines.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance and traceability.
